calls.query: const r = await tools.exec_command({cmd:"sed -n '1,260p' AGENTS.md && sed -n '1,320p' .github/prompts/predict.md","workdir":"/home/runner/work/fedcourtsai/fedcourtsai","yield_time_ms":10000,"max_output_tokens":30000}); text(r.output)

const names = ALL_TOOLS.filter(x => /courtlistener|search|citation/i.test(x.name+" "+x.description)); text(names);

const rs = await Promise.all([
  tools.mcp__courtlistener__search({type:"o", q:"\"Illinois Brick\" \"lost profits\" indirect purchaser", filed_before:"2026-07-17", num_results:5, fields:["caseName","court_citation_string","dateFiled","citation","snippet","absolute_url"]}),
  tools.mcp__courtlistener__search({type:"o", q:"\"opportunity to conspire\" \"trade association\" plus factor", filed_before:"2026-07-17", num_results:5, fields:["caseName","court_citation_string","dateFiled","citation","snip

const r = await tools.mcp__courtlistener__get_endpoint_item({endpoint_id:"opinions",item_id:11240564,fields:["id","html_with_citations","plain_text","type","author"]}); if (r?.content) for (const c of r.content) c.type==="image"?image(c):c.text&&text(c.text); else text(r)

const r = await tools.exec_command({cmd:"jq -r '.sections[].title // .sections[].name // .sections[].key // empty' metrics/statpack.json && jq '.sections | length' metrics/statpack.json && jq '.sections[] | select((.title // .name // .key // \"\")|test(\"salience\";\"i\"))' metrics/statpack.json","workdir":"/home/runner/work/fedcourtsai/fedcourtsai","yield_time_ms":10000,"max_output_tokens":20000}); text(r.output)

const r = await tools.exec_command({cmd:"jq '.. | objects | select(.case_id? == \"scotus/73281354\")' data/scope/scope.json","workdir":"/home/runner/work/fedcourtsai/fedcourtsai","yield_time_ms":10000,"max_output_tokens":10000}); text(r.output)
